users.name: Dr. John Doe Ee
users.bio: Dr. John Doe is a world-renowned specialist in structural heart disease with over 15 years of clinical excellence. He pioneered the use of minimally invasive valve replacements at M-FLO General and currently serves as the Head of Cardiovascular Research.

users.name: Dr. Sarah Smith
users.bio: Dr. Sarah Smith is a leading expert in advanced medical imaging with 12 years of clinical experience. She specializes in diagnostic radiology and has implemented cutting-edge imaging protocols at M-FLO General.

users.name: Dr. Robert Chen
users.bio: Dr. Robert Chen is an accomplished internist with 10 years of experience in chronic disease management and preventive medicine. He is committed to evidence-based practice and patient education.

users.name: Dr. Lisa Patel
users.bio: Dr. Lisa Patel is an expert cardiologist with 14 years of experience in interventional cardiology and electrophysiology. She has trained numerous residents and fellows in advanced cardiac procedures.

users.name: Dr. Michael Johnson
users.bio: Dr. Michael Johnson is the Director of the Clinical Laboratory with 11 years of experience in diagnostic laboratory medicine. He oversees all laboratory operations and quality assurance protocols.
